channel.title: Self-Represented on DIVORCE CRUSHER
channel.description: Recent content in Self-Represented on DIVORCE CRUSHER

item.title: FATHER'S FIRE ENGULFS MOTHER'S CASE — COURTROOM RICOCHET KILLS SHODDY ARGUMENTS
item.description:
FATHER’S FIRE ENGULFS MOTHER’S CASE — COURTROOM RICOCHET KILLS SHODDY ARGUMENTS

FATHER’S FIRE ENGULF MOTHER’S CASE — COURTROOM RICOCHET KILLS SHODDY ARGUMENTS

Hook

Are you a dad who feels like the court system is rigged against you? Do you feel like your ex is using every trick in the book to keep you from your kids? You’re not alone. But here’s the truth: you have the power to turn the tide. Self-represented dads have won custody battles by arming themselves with cold, hard facts and the law. Let’s dive into how you can do the same.
